title: Crafter Presets
description: A Mod Where You Can Load Crafter Presets!
body:
**Crafter Presets** lets you save and load slot configurations for Crafter blocks with a single click or hotkey.

## Features

- **Multiple Presets** — Create, rename, edit, and manage as many presets as you need from the Presets tab. Each preset stores a full 3×3 slot layout. A visual grid editor lets you design presets without needing a Crafter block.
- **Single Preset Mode** — Prefer the simplicity of one preset? Toggle this on in the Presets tab and the save button will always overwrite your current preset.
- **Save & Load** — Save your current Crafter slot layout with the on-screen button. Load the selected preset with the Load button or press **J**.
- **Auto-Load & Auto-Exit** — Toggle both with **F9** or in the settings menu. When enabled, opening a Crafter automatically applies your selected preset and closes the GUI.
- **Silent Mode** — Suppresses slot-clicking sounds during preset loading.
- **Outlines** — Crafters loaded with a preset are highlighted with a colored outline. Pick any color you want in the Miscellaneous tab.
- **Settings Menu** — Press **~** to open a tabbed settings screen: Settings for behavior toggles, Presets for preset management, and Miscellaneous for silent mode and outline color.

All presets and settings are saved to disk and persist across sessions. Automatically migrates v2 presets. Client-side only — no server mod required.
